
---
title: "TidyTuesday Practice"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Load Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytuesdayR)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
tuesdata <- tt_load('2026-05-12')

names(tuesdata)
```

## Select Dataset

```{r}
data <- tuesdata[[1]]

glimpse(data)
```

## Simple Visualization

```{r}
data %>%
  count() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = 1)) +
  geom_point(size = 5)
```
